description_long: This object consists of a group of modern residential houses arranged in a small neighborhood layout, each with distinct architectural features. The houses display a mix of flat and low-pitched roofs, with some featuring rooftop terraces and large, rectangular windows. The exteriors are finished in a combination of neutral tones, including white, gray, and muted earth colors, with some accent walls in brighter hues. Landscaping elements such as trees, shrubs, and small lawns are integrated around the houses, enhancing the suburban feel. The buildings vary in size and height, with both single-story and two-story structures present, and some houses have attached garages or driveways. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A cluster of modern houses with flat and low-pitched roofs, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, arranged in a small neighborhood layout.
description_view_0: This view highlights the arrangement of the houses, showing the largest house with a dark roof in the center and other houses spaced around it, with visible driveways and landscaping.
description_view_1: From this angle, the houses' spatial relationship is clearer, with the two-story house and its large windows prominent in the foreground, and the smaller houses and greenery visible around the perimeter.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the two-story house with its flat roof and balcony, as well as the separation between the houses and the presence of trees and lawns.
description_view_3: Here, the orange-accented house and the main entryways of several houses are visible, along with the arrangement of trees and the open spaces between the buildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small porches or overhangs, and minimal decorative elements; a few have steps or integrated garage entrances.
